name: Resend
description: Send, retrieve, and cancel emails via the Resend API
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The Resend API action to perform.

from.label: From
from.description: Sender email address. Used by: Send Email.

to.label: To
to.description: Recipient email address. Used by: Send Email.

subject.label: Subject
subject.description: Email subject line. Used by: Send Email.

html.label: HTML Body
html.description: HTML email body. Used by: Send Email.

replyTo.label: Reply To
replyTo.description: Reply-to email address. Used by: Send Email.

cc.label: CC
cc.description: CC recipient email address. Used by: Send Email.

bcc.label: BCC
bcc.description: BCC recipient email address. Used by: Send Email.

emailId.label: Email ID
emailId.description: Resend email ID. Used by: Get Email, Cancel Email.
